title: Great Council (Yuuzhan Vong)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Great Council''' was the leadership council that advised the [[Supreme Overlord]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. The Great Council was composed of the members of the various leaders of the [[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|Elite]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong castes|Ruling Castes]]. Meeting in the [[Hall of Confluence]], thousands of caste members would also attend the meetings of the Great Council.

In theory, it advised the Supreme Overlord, and aided him in ruling the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] according to the will of the [[Yun'o|Gods]]. In practice, however, the Supreme Overlord was capable of accepting advice he wanted, and choosing which members of the castes would serve their various leadership positions.

==Members==
===Members as of [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]===
*[[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]]
*[[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]
*[[High Prefect]] [[Yoog Skell]]
*[[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] [[Jakan]]
*[[Master Shaper]] [[Ch'Gang Hool]]

===Members as of [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]===
*Supreme Overlord Shimrra Jamaane
*Warmaster [[Nas Choka]]
*High Prefect [[Drathul]]
*High Priest Jakan
*Master Shaper [[Yal Phaath]]

===Members as of [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]===
*Supreme Overlord Shimrra Jamaane
*Warmaster Nas Choka
*High Prefect Drathul
*High Priest Jakan
*Master Shaper [[Qelah Kwaad]]
